entryType: Direct entry into living area with immediate access to main circulation space
kitchenLocation: Central location adjacent to dining area and main circulation corridor, with easy access to living space
bedroomLayout: Split bedroom layout with bedrooms on opposite sides of the unit for privacy
bathroomPlacement: Two full bathrooms strategically placed - one ensuite with master bedroom, one shared hall bath accessible from main living areas
efficiencyNotes: Galley-style kitchen maximizes counter and storage space
Central hallway minimizes wasted circulation space
Compact laundry area integrated near kitchen
uniqueFeatures: Walk-in closet in master bedroom unusual for 880 sqft unit
Separate utility/laundry room rather than stacked in closet
Two full bathrooms in compact footprint
Kitchen island or peninsula for additional workspace
dimensionNotes: Rectangular footprint approximately 41'5" x 26'7", bedrooms are generously sized for the overall square footage, kitchen appears galley-style but with good counter space, bathrooms are compact but functional
